positive: Minimalist abstract landscape featuring a majestic, stylized mountain range under a dramatic, vibrant aurora borealis. The foreground shows silhouetted evergreen trees and a winding river, rendered in deep emerald and sapphire blues against streaks of neon cyan and violet. Clean vector graphic style, high contrast, perfect symmetry, designed for t-shirt print, flat colors with subtle gradients, white background element for crop ease, cinematic lighting, isometric view, high detail.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, logo, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, messy, grayscale, low detail, photography
